title: sophora buxbaumii
intro: Sophora buxbaumii, also known as marsh velvet bean or marsh bird's foot trefoil, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Sophora buxbaumii include its potential to support the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Sophora buxbaumii is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
